title: schoenus australis
intro: Schoenus australis, also known as the swamp sedge or black sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schoenus australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
